'''âm-m-d''' ('''mamada''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yammer|yammer]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-m-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yammer|yammer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-m-d
|-
! Lemma
| mamada
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mamadithi|mamadithi]] || [[word:mamadiji|mamadiji]] || [[word:mamadishi|mamadishi]] || [[word:mamadi|mamadi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mamaduthuth|mamaduthuth]] || [[word:mamadujuj|mamadujuj]] || [[word:mamadushush|mamadushush]] || [[word:mamad|mamad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mamaduthu|mamaduthu]] || [[word:mamaduju|mamaduju]] || [[word:mamadushu|mamadushu]] || [[word:mamadu|mamadu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mamadufuth|mamadufuth]] || [[word:mamadufuj|mamadufuj]] || [[word:mamadufush|mamadufush]] || [[word:mamaduf|mamaduf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mamadethe|mamadethe]] || [[word:mamadeje|mamadeje]] || [[word:mamadeshe|mamadeshe]] || [[word:mamade|mamade]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mamadothoth|mamadothoth]] || [[word:mamadojoj|mamadojoj]] || [[word:mamadoshosh|mamadoshosh]] || [[word:mamad|mamad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mamadotho|mamadotho]] || [[word:mamadojo|mamadojo]] || [[word:mamadosho|mamadosho]] || [[word:mamado|mamado]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mamadofoth|mamadofoth]] || [[word:mamadofoj|mamadofoj]] || [[word:mamadofosh|mamadofosh]] || [[word:mamadof|mamadof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mamadĂŠthĂŠ|mamadĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:mamadĂŠjĂŠ|mamadĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:mamadĂŠshĂŠ|mamadĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:mamadĂŠ|mamadĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mamadathath|mamadathath]] || [[word:mamadajaj|mamadajaj]] || [[word:mamadashash|mamadashash]] || [[word:mamad|mamad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mamadatha|mamadatha]] || [[word:mamadaja|mamadaja]] || [[word:mamadasha|mamadasha]] || [[word:mamada|mamada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mamadafath|mamadafath]] || [[word:mamadafaj|mamadafaj]] || [[word:mamadafash|mamadafash]] || [[word:mamadaf|mamadaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:mamadasha|mamadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gomamadasha|gomamadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokimamadasha|gokimamadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:mamadnĂŒsha|mamadnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gomamadnknĂŒsha|gomamadnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokimamadnĂŒsha|gokimamadnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mamadshĂ«sha|mamadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomamadnkshĂ«sha|gomamadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimamadshĂ«sha|gokimamadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mamadrosha|mamadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomamadnkrosha|gomamadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimamadrosha|gokimamadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mamadmusha|mamadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gomamadnkmusha|gomamadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimamadmusha|gokimamadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:mamadsherasha|mamadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gomamadnksherasha|gomamadnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokimamadsherasha|gokimamadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:mamadngasha|mamadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gomamadnkngasha|gomamadnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokimamadngasha|gokimamadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mamadyasha|mamadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gomamadnkyasha|gomamadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokimamadyasha|gokimamadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:mamadyamasha|mamadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gomamadnkyamasha|gomamadnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokimamadyamasha|gokimamadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:mamadnĂŒshĂ«sha|mamadnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomamadnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gomamadnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimamadnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokimamadnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:mamadnĂŒrosha|mamadnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomamadnknĂŒrosha|gomamadnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimamadnĂŒrosha|gokimamadnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mamadnĂŒmusha|mamadnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomamadnknĂŒmusha|gomamadnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimamadnĂŒmusha|gokimamadnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:mamadshĂ«nĂŒsha|mamadshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomamadnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gomamadnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimamadshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokimamadshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:mamadshĂ«rosha|mamadshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomamadnkshĂ«rosha|gomamadnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimamadshĂ«rosha|gokimamadshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mamadshĂ«musha|mamadshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomamadnkshĂ«musha|gomamadnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimamadshĂ«musha|gokimamadshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:mamadronĂŒsha|mamadronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomamadnkronĂŒsha|gomamadnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimamadronĂŒsha|gokimamadronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:mamadroshĂ«sha|mamadroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomamadnkroshĂ«sha|gomamadnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimamadroshĂ«sha|gokimamadroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mamadromusha|mamadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomamadnkromusha|gomamadnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimamadromusha|gokimamadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:mamadmunĂŒsha|mamadmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gomamadnkmunĂŒsha|gomamadnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokimamadmunĂŒsha|gokimamadmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:mamadmushĂ«sha|mamadmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gomamadnkmushĂ«sha|gomamadnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokimamadmushĂ«sha|gokimamadmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:mamadmurosha|mamadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomamadnkmurosha|gomamadnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokimamadmurosha|gokimamadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:mamad|mamad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:mĂŠmĂŠd|mĂŠmĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:homamad|homamad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:homĂŠmĂŠd|homĂŠmĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomamad|hohomamad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohomĂŠmĂŠd|hohomĂŠmĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒmamad|nĂŒmamad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒmĂŠmĂŠd|nĂŒmĂŠmĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒmamad|nĂŒnĂŒmamad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒmĂŠmĂŠd|nĂŒnĂŒmĂŠmĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻmamad|nĂŻmamad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻmĂŠmĂŠd|nĂŻmĂŠmĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻmamad|nĂŻnĂŻmamad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻmĂŠmĂŠd|nĂŻnĂŻmĂŠmĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lumamad|lumamad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lumĂŠmĂŠd|lumĂŠmĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumamad|lulumamad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulumĂŠmĂŠd|lulumĂŠmĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:limamad|limamad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:limĂŠmĂŠd|limĂŠmĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimamad|lilimamad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilimĂŠmĂŠd|lilimĂŠmĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:komamad|komamad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:komĂŠmĂŠd|komĂŠmĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomamad|kokomamad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokomĂŠmĂŠd|kokomĂŠmĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kemamad|kemamad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kemĂŠmĂŠd|kemĂŠmĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemamad|kekemamad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekemĂŠmĂŠd|kekemĂŠmĂŠd]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
